name: viz-gateway
description: Federated multisig gateway between VIZ and remote chains (TON, Solana, ...): lock VIZ, mint wrapped VIZ.

scripts.test:unit: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node tools/run-unit-tests.mjs
scripts.verify: node tools/threshold-calc.mjs && node tools/viz-multisig-spike.cjs && node tools/gram-notification-spike.cjs && node tools/writepaths-spike.cjs && node tools/orchestration-spike.cjs && node tools/rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/gram-rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-rotation-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-writepath-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-orchestration-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-innerix-spike.cjs && node tools/outbox-spike.cjs && node tools/dispatcher-policy-spike.cjs && node tools/fee-viz-spike.cjs && node tools/canonical-spike.cjs && node tools/viz-scan-cursor-spike.cjs && node tools/viz-lying-node-spike.cjs && node tools/gram-scan-pagination-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-scan-pagination-spike.cjs && node tools/solana-upgrade-authority-spike.cjs && node tools/recon-failclosed-spike.cjs && node tools/pegout-address-spike.cjs && node tools/lookup-validate-spike.cjs && node tools/pegout-guard-spike.cjs && node tools/signer-f2-spike.cjs && node tools/gram-pegout-f2-spike.cjs && node tools/fee-sweep-refund-spike.cjs && node tools/no-memo-refund-spike.cjs && node tools/idempotent-delivery-spike.cjs && node tools/idempotency-collision-spike.cjs && node tools/seen-recovery-spike.cjs && node tools/fetch-timeout-spike.cjs && node tools/viz-rpc-retry-spike.cjs && node tools/pegout-release-sigcount-spike.cjs && node tools/staff-alert-spike.cjs && node tools/log-dir-fallback-spike.cjs && node tools/http-body-limit-spike.cjs && node tools/deploy-consistency-spike.cjs && node contracts/ton/tools/verify-offline.cjs && node tools/e2e-config-spike.cjs && node tools/deposit-pda-spike.cjs && node tools/gram-onchain-approval-spike.cjs && node tools/gram-proposer-fallback-spike.cjs && node tools/gateway-accounts-spike.cjs && node tools/viz-memo-decrypt-spike.cjs && node tools/gram-return-approval-spike.cjs
scripts.e2e:gram: npm run build && node tools/e2e/dist/roundtrip.js gram
scripts.e2e:gram:metadata: npm run build && bash -c 'set -a; . ./.env.e2e; set +a; node tools/e2e/dist/gram-metadata.js'
scripts.e2e:gram:fee-sweep: npm run build && bash -c 'set -a; . ./.env.e2e; set +a; node tools/e2e/dist/gram-fee-sweep.js'
scripts.e2e:federation: npm run build && env $(grep -v '^#' .env.e2e | xargs) node tools/e2e/dist/federation.js
